## AbstractModelClass.replaceOne() method

Replaces a single document in the database. The document to be replaced will be determined based on the unique key defined in the schema.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static replaceOne(doc: any, options?: QueryReplaceOneOptions): Promise<any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

doc


</td><td>

any


</td><td>

The document to be replaced in the database. It must include the unique key defined in the schema to identify the document to be replaced.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryReplaceOneOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the replaceOne operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the replaced document, including any default values and generated keys.

## Remarks

- Nested schema values will be saved to their corresponding object stores. - By default the keyPath will be `_id`<!-- -->, but it can be configured in the schema options.

## Example


```ts
const user = await UserModel.replaceOne({ _id: '123', name: 'John', age: 30 });
console.log(user);
```
